text:
On 2012-11-10 04:17, Armin Gruner wrote:
> Hi,
>
> I haven't seen the PR earlier, I opened a PR ports/173525
> which bumps the port version to the current upstream release 0.9.6
> (the PODOFO knob works as well)
>
> Cheers & Greetings from Munich

Armin,

Thanks!  I had submitted the update but had an issue with PODOFO so I 
am testing your patch out now.

Rusty
